tools.name: search_keywords
tools.description: Search Mercado Libre keywords by term. Returns search volume, depth, strength/competition and top-ranking products, for any of the 18 ML markets. Free tier returns up to 10 results; Pro up to 200; data-license up to 1000.

tools.name: competitor_report
tools.description: Radar de Competencia: a product-level competitive report for a Mercado Libre product ID (e.g. MLM123…). Returns its real competitors (by keyword overlap), reach/Alcance, keyword gaps, where it is losing, and head-to-head win rates.

tools.name: category_demand
tools.description: Top categories/niches on a Mercado Libre market by product count — the highest-movement niches for product research ("what to sell").

tools.name: get_markets
tools.description: List the 18 Mercado Libre markets Teclazo covers (code, country).

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Your Teclazo plan, current limits, and the upgrade tiers. Use to check remaining volume and pitch upgrades.
